subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Beloved, my Master and my King! My tongue, my heart and my limbs do testify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و محبوبی و مالکی و سلطانی یشهد لسانی و قلبی و جوارحی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
